title.zh: 王路远 | 软件工程师

eyebrow.en: Software engineer with a research backbone and product instincts.
eyebrow.zh: 兼具科研背景与产品思维的软件工程师。

roleFocus.zh:
AI、机器人，以及
软件系统

intro.en: My work spans software engineering, computer vision, robotics, and practical applications of large language models. I care about products that feel thoughtful on the surface and solid underneath.
intro.zh: 我的工作横跨软件工程、计算机视觉、机器人，以及大语言模型的实际应用。我在意的不只是功能本身，也在意产品表层体验与底层工程是否同样扎实。

intro.en: Outside work, I recharge through badminton, skiing, hiking, and side projects that keep my curiosity sharp.
intro.zh: 工作之外，我会通过打羽毛球、滑雪、爬山，以及做一些小型 side project 来保持好奇心与能量。

label.zh: 具备产品思维的构建者

title.en: A clean overview of how I work.
title.zh: 用更清晰的方式介绍我如何工作。

description.en: I hope this message provides a better understanding of who I am.
description.zh: 希望这段文字能让你更了解我。

paragraphs.en: My name is Wang Luyuan, and I am a software engineer. My interests include software engineering, computer vision, robotics, and applications of large language models.
paragraphs.zh: 我叫王路远，是一名软件工程师。我的兴趣方向包括软件工程、计算机视觉、机器人，以及大语言模型的应用。

paragraphs.en: I enjoy building systems that bridge research and real-world product constraints. I like shipping polished interfaces, but I am equally motivated by debugging, refactoring, and making a system easier to trust.
paragraphs.zh: 我喜欢做那些能把科研思路与真实产品约束连接起来的系统。我喜欢打磨界面，也同样享受调试、重构，以及让系统更值得信任的过程。

paragraphs.en: In my free time, I enjoy badminton, skiing, hiking, and spending time with friends. As an INTJ, I can be outgoing with people I know well, while still being naturally reserved.
paragraphs.zh: 业余时间我喜欢打羽毛球、滑雪、爬山，也喜欢和朋友出去玩。作为一个 INTJ，我会在熟悉的人面前很放松，但本质上依然偏内向。

description.en: I value maintainability, clarity, and refactors that reduce long-term friction.
description.zh: 我重视可维护性、清晰度，以及真正能降低长期成本的重构。

description.en: I am comfortable moving from papers and prototypes into production-minded implementation.
description.zh: 我能把论文和原型里的思路，落到更贴近生产环境的实现里。

description.en: I think about user trust, interaction details, and how technical choices shape the experience.
description.zh: 我会考虑用户信任、交互细节，以及技术选型如何影响最终体验。

description.en: Badminton, skiing, hiking, and side projects keep my learning loop alive.
description.zh: 羽毛球、滑雪、爬山与 side project 一直在帮我保持学习的节奏。

description.en: Find the main ways to reach me and the public links I keep active.
description.zh: 这里整理了最常用的联系方式和公开链接。

sidebarDescription.en: Email is the fastest way to reach me. You can also find me on GitHub, LinkedIn, and my blog.
sidebarDescription.zh: 邮件是联系我最快的方式，也可以通过 GitHub、LinkedIn 和博客找到我。

cardDescription.en: If you have something interesting to build, research, or discuss, feel free to reach out.
cardDescription.zh: 如果你有想合作、交流或一起推进的事情，欢迎直接联系我。

title.en: Selected milestones across industry, research, and school.
title.zh: 按时间梳理的重要阶段。

description.en: A concise view of the roles, labs, and schools that shaped how I build.
description.zh: 用更简洁的方式展示塑造我做事方法的工作、科研和求学经历。

description.en: Completed high school in Beijing.
description.zh: 高中毕业于北京一零一中学。

org.en: Huazhong University of Science and Technology

alt.en: Huazhong University of Science and Technology logo

description.en: Built a foundation across information theory, digital signal processing, computer networks, and engineering systems.
description.zh: 系统学习了信息论、数字信号处理、计算机网络等课程，打下了扎实的工程基础。

description.en: Led recruitment, technical sharing, and delivery for one of the most influential student technical communities at HUST.
description.zh: 在华科最具影响力的学生技术团队之一负责招新、技术分享与 iOS 项目推进。

role.zh: 移动客户端开发实习生

description.en: Joined Tencent SNG as an intern and worked on mobile client development in a large-scale consumer internet environment.
description.zh: 在腾讯 SNG 实习，参与移动客户端开发，第一次接触大规模互联网产品的工程协作方式。

org.zh: 密苏里大学哥伦比亚分校

description.en: Studied robotics, machine learning, real-time embedded computing, and cloud systems during my final undergraduate year.
description.zh: 在大四赴美交流，学习机器人、机器学习、实时嵌入式计算与云计算等课程。

description.en: Developed a prototype for a vision-guided autonomous driving setup and designed much of the software system end to end.
description.zh: 在视觉引导自动驾驶原型项目中负责系统级设计与开发，覆盖软件主体与部分硬件方案。

description.en: Worked on feature delivery, bug fixing, and code refactoring for consumer video products inside IES.
description.zh: 参与新功能开发、问题修复与代码重构，服务面向大众的视频产品。

org.en: Visualization and Graphics Laboratory, Tsinghua University
org.zh: 清华大学可视化与图形学研究室

description.en: Worked on visualization-related research as part of the VIS Lab.
description.zh: 在清华大学可视化与图形学研究室从事科研工作。

role.en: Master of Electrical and Computer Engineering
role.zh: 电子与计算机工程硕士

description.en: Focused on advanced coursework and research at the intersection of systems, perception, and robotics.
description.zh: 在系统、感知与机器人交叉方向继续深造。

org.zh: 卡内基梅隆大学 Biorobotics Lab

description.en: Contributed to CMU biorobotics research and 3D mapping-related work.
description.zh: 参与 CMU Biorobotics Lab 的科研与三维重建相关项目。

description.en: Completed a software engineering internship focused on shipping product-facing engineering work inside Apple.
description.zh: 在 Apple Services 完成软件工程实习，参与面向产品的工程工作。

role.zh: 软件 / 机器学习工程师

description.en: Worked on machine learning and software engineering problems in an intelligent machines setting.
description.zh: 在智能机器场景中处理机器学习与软件工程问题。

description.en: Built reliable AI/ML systems with production constraints, polish, and scale in mind.
description.zh: 继续在生产环境约束下打造稳定、可扩展且具备完成度的 AI/ML 系统。

description.en: Building video generation models with a focus on production quality, scale, and practical impact.
description.zh: 在 Meta 训练视频生成模型，继续关注生产质量、规模化与真实业务影响。

title.en: The fuller background behind the headline.
title.zh: 标题之下，更完整的经历背景。

description.en: A fuller view of my work, study, research, and side projects.
description.zh: 这里汇总了我的工作、求学、科研和个人项目经历。

description.en: Academic foundations across China and the United States.
description.zh: 在中国与美国完成的学术积累。

description.en: Industry roles across consumer products, intelligent machines, and AI/ML systems.
description.zh: 在消费产品、智能机器和 AI/ML 系统方向的行业经历。

description.en: Research experience across robotics, visualization, and perception systems.
description.zh: 在机器人、可视化与感知系统方向的科研经历。

title.zh: 卡内基梅隆大学 - 助理研究员

detail.en: Worked in the Biorobotics Lab at Carnegie Mellon University.
detail.zh: 在卡内基梅隆大学 Biorobotics Lab 任助研。

detail.en: Worked at the Visualization and Graphics Laboratory, Tsinghua University, as a research assistant.
detail.zh: 在清华大学可视化与图形学研究室任助研。

detail.en: Developed a prototype to explore the feasibility of vision-guided autonomous driving and designed the overall software system.
detail.zh: 在 Video Processing and Communication Lab 任助研，负责开发一个用于探索视觉引导自动驾驶可行性的原型系统。

description.en: Leadership and community-building work outside formal coursework.
description.zh: 在正式课程之外的组织与带队经历。

detail.en: One of the most influential student technical teams at HUST. I served as the leader of the iOS group and was involved in recruitment, technical training, and delivery.
detail.zh: 冰岩作坊是华中科技大学最具影响力的互联网技术团队之一。我曾任 iOS 组组长，负责招新面试、技术培训与项目交付。

description.en: Smaller product and systems work that still matters to how I build.
description.zh: 一些规模较小但同样影响我做事方式的产品与系统实践。

detail.en: A schedule app for Chongqing Medical University students. I handled the full flow from product and engineering to operations; the app was released on the App Store.
detail.zh: “重医助手”是一款为重庆医科大学学生服务的课表类应用，我独立负责从产品到运营的完整流程，并曾上架 App Store。

detail.en: An education-focused tool app where I independently handled the iOS client and also created a mini-program for promotion.
detail.zh: “背它”是冰岩作坊的团队项目，我独立负责 iOS 端开发，并为推广活动编写过“背它 Lite”小程序。

detail.en: An internal app for managing team events and participants through a calendar interface, distributed via TestFlight.
detail.zh: “蛛网”是一款内部应用，可以通过日历查看团队活动并编辑参与者，通过 TestFlight 分发。

title.en: Fuzzy Navigation System for Mobile Robots
title.zh: 模糊逻辑移动机器人导航系统

detail.en: A navigation system that uses fuzzy logic to guide a mobile robot toward a destination while avoiding obstacles.
detail.zh: 通过模糊逻辑让移动机器人在避障的同时接近目标点的导航系统。

description.en: Recognition from student communities, competitions, and internships.
description.zh: 来自学生组织、比赛和实习项目的阶段性认可。

detail.en: The highest internal honor within Bingyan Studio.
detail.zh: “最佳冰岩人”是冰岩作坊内部最高荣誉。

detail.en: Won at Tencent SNG's intern competition with an app that used deep learning to recognize driver emotions for safer driving.
detail.zh: 在腾讯 SNG 实习生比赛中获奖，项目通过深度学习识别司机情绪，从而提升行车安全性。

title.en: ZTE Cup Software Development Competition, Second Prize
title.zh: 中兴捧月杯软件开发大赛 二等奖

detail.en: Built an app that automatically recognizes license plates to help campus security handle illegal parking. The same project also received second prize in Wuhan University's mobile app design competition.
detail.zh: 实现了一款自动识别车牌号的 App，用于帮助学校保卫处处理违规停车。该项目同时获得“武汉大学移动应用设计大赛”二等奖。

title.en: Seed Cup Programming Competition, Merit Award
title.zh: 种子杯编程大赛 优胜奖

detail.en: Predicted NBA game results using machine learning techniques.
detail.zh: 通过机器学习技术预测 NBA 比赛结果。

description.en: A practical snapshot rather than an exhaustive list.
description.zh: 更偏向实践中的能力概览，而不是穷尽式清单。

detail.en: Proficient in Swift, C, Objective-C, Java, and C++. Familiar with Python, Matlab, JavaScript, and SQL. Also explored Dart, Lua, Assembly, Verilog, and Bash.
detail.zh: 熟悉 Swift、C、Objective-C；了解 Java、C++、Python、Matlab、JavaScript、SQL；接触过 Dart、Lua、汇编、Verilog、Bash。

detail.en: Experienced in iOS application development and familiar with web front-end, web back-end, embedded systems, robotics, image processing, and AI/ML workflows.
detail.zh: 熟悉 iOS 应用开发；了解 Web 前端、Web 后端、嵌入式系统、机器人、图像处理与人工智能相关工作流。

title.en: Selected builds from earlier stages of my work.
title.zh: 来自不同阶段的一组代表作品。

description.en: A selection of earlier projects from school, research, and the first years of my career.
description.zh: 这里收录了我在求学、科研和职业早期阶段完成的一些项目。

detail.en: This project is an early prototype of a smart road system. There are 4 cameras that cover the whole lab. Each camera is connected to a computer. Using image processing, I can precisely detect the position of the front point and the end point of a car in the image frame. As the cameras are calibrated, those positions can be converted into the world frame. Thus the 3D position and orientation of a given car can be calculated. To control the mini-car through the Wi-Fi network, we replace the built-in remote controller with Raspberry-Pi. PWM waves are generated and control the servo motor and the DC motor. The 4 computers share information through the Ethernet network, and each of them has a separate Wi-Fi network card and acts as a small base station. To make the mini-car able to roam across different base stations, the network card on the mini-car works in a connectionless way. The lane-keeping controller is a PID controller. Given the position and status of a mini-car, we can calculate a virtual target position. As the car is moving, the virtual target is also moving, so the car can run along the lane stably. We use ROS as our inter-computers communication framework and Rviz to visualize the system state. I designed and implemented the entire software system, as well as part of the hardware system.
detail.zh: 这是一个智能道路系统的早期原型。实验室中有 4 个摄像头覆盖整块区域，每个摄像头连接一台电脑。通过图像处理，可以精确定位小车前后端点在图像中的位置；由于摄像头已经完成标定，这些位置能够进一步转换到世界坐标系，从而得到小车的三维位置与朝向。为了通过 Wi-Fi 控制小车，我们用 Raspberry Pi 替换了原有遥控器，并通过 PWM 控制舵机和直流电机。4 台电脑通过以太网共享信息，每台电脑还配有独立的 Wi-Fi 网卡，相当于一个小型基站。为了让小车能在不同基站间漫游，车载网卡采用无连接的通信方式。车道保持部分使用 PID 控制器，根据小车当前位置和状态实时计算虚拟目标点，使车辆能够稳定沿车道行驶。整个系统采用 ROS 进行多机通信，并用 Rviz 做状态可视化。我负责了整个软件系统的设计与实现，以及部分硬件系统。

title.en: A Hand Gesture Recognizer based on Machine Learning
title.zh: 基于机器学习的手势识别器

detail.en: We use HOG, LBP and skin color as the key features. To get better performance, PCA is used to reduce the dimension. In order to detect the position of the hand, we use 3 different sizes of sliding windows to scan the image. Then, a heat-map is generated and the hottest location is most likely the hand. The sub-image is then fed into the next classifier to classify gestures. 5 different gestures can be recognized, including open-hand and thumb-up. Instead of downloading training sets from the Internet, we collected hundreds of images by ourselves.
detail.zh: 我们使用 HOG、LBP 与肤色信息作为关键特征，并通过 PCA 进行降维以提升性能。为了检测手在图像中的位置，我们采用 3 种不同尺寸的滑动窗口扫描图像，再生成热力图，热度最高的位置最有可能是手部区域。随后将该局部图像送入下一级分类器，用于判断具体手势。系统可以识别包括张开手掌、竖拇指在内的 5 种手势。训练数据并非从网上直接下载，而是我们自己采集了数百张图片。

detail.en: In this project, I wrote four simple C programs and used Clang with LLVM to compile them with different options. The generated LLVM IR code before and after optimization was compared. The gem5 simulator was used to analyze execution time and cache miss rate. Finally, these optimization techniques were applied to Polybench for broader comparison.
detail.zh: 在这个项目中，我编写了 4 个简单的 C 程序，并使用 Clang 与 LLVM 在不同编译选项下进行编译，对比优化前后的 LLVM IR。之后借助 gem5 模拟器分析运行时间与缓存未命中率，并将这些优化方法进一步应用到 Polybench 上进行更广泛的比较。

title.zh: 移动机器人防倾覆控制

detail.en: By controlling the heavy manipulator installed on the mobile robot, the center of gravity can be adjusted and the stability of the robot can be improved. In this project, I implemented an algorithm to read IMU sensors and calculate the ideal pose of the robot. The algorithm was tested and verified with the V-REP simulator. The simulation code was written in Lua, and the controller program was implemented in Matlab.
detail.zh: 通过控制安装在移动机器人上的重型机械臂，可以主动调整重心，从而提升系统稳定性。我在这个项目中实现了一个算法，用于读取 IMU 传感器并计算机器人的理想姿态。算法在 V-REP 模拟器中进行了验证，仿真代码使用 Lua 编写，控制程序使用 Matlab 实现。

title.en: Course Project of Building Intelligent Robot

detail.en: There are three PUMA robots and one mobile robot. A binocular camera system detects black cylinders and guides the PUMA robot arm to pick them up and place them on the mobile robot. The mobile robot localizes itself using AR markers, navigates to the next position, and avoids obstacles with infrared sensors. All robots communicate through ROS.
detail.zh: 该项目包含 3 台 PUMA 机械臂和 1 台移动机器人。双目摄像系统负责检测黑色圆柱体的位置，并引导 PUMA 机械臂抓取后放置到移动机器人上。移动机器人通过识别 AR 标记完成定位，并依靠红外传感器进行避障导航。所有机器人之间通过 ROS 完成通信。

detail.en: The system includes project, budget, and team member management. The front-end is implemented with React, the back-end with Django, and the database with MySQL.
detail.zh: 系统具备项目管理、预算管理与成员管理等功能。前端使用 React，后端使用 Django，数据库使用 MySQL。

detail.en: Implemented a coroutine library and its scheduler in C. Assembly was used to control register states across function calls. Each coroutine can call blocking functions such as sleep without freezing the whole system. Outputs from tasks are transferred to a named pipe and displayed in another terminal. The project was designed for Linux and later adapted to macOS after solving a byte alignment issue.
detail.zh: 我使用 C 实现了一套协程库及其调度器，并使用汇编语言控制函数调用过程中的寄存器状态。每个协程任务都可以调用 sleep 这类阻塞函数而不影响整个系统继续运行。任务输出通过命名管道传递到另一个终端显示。项目最初面向 Linux 设计，后来在修复字节对齐问题后也适配了 macOS。

detail.en: A camera detects the rolling tennis ball and predicts its trajectory. Once the interception point is calculated, commands are sent to a car-like robot through Bluetooth so that it can catch the ball. The core controller also has a GUI to visualize system status.
detail.zh: 系统通过摄像头检测滚动中的网球并预测其轨迹，在计算出交点后，通过蓝牙向小车式机器人发送控制指令，以便其拦截小球。核心控制器还带有图形界面，用于可视化系统状态。

detail.en: An app that helps students memorize course materials more easily. Users can paste documents or scan them with the camera. The app supports gesture interactions that make it easy to mark important content.
detail.zh: 这是一款帮助学生更高效记忆课程内容的应用。用户既可以复制粘贴资料，也可以用相机扫描。应用支持手势交互，方便快速标记重点内容。

detail.en: An internal team management tool for Bingyan Studio.
detail.zh: 一款为冰岩作坊内部协作打造的团队管理工具。

title.en: A Wireless Communication System with Pluto SDR
title.zh: 基于 Pluto SDR 的无线通信系统

detail.en: Used Pluto SDR to implement a simple wireless communication system. Two reliable communication protocols, stop-and-wait and sliding window, were built to support stable communication. The system can transmit text or arbitrary files.
detail.zh: 该项目使用 Pluto SDR 实现了一个简单的无线通信系统，并实现了停止等待协议与滑动窗口协议两种可靠传输机制，从而支持稳定的数据传输。系统既可以发送文本，也可以传输任意文件。

detail.en: By changing the distance between a hand and the sensor, players can control the distance between two red squares. The goal is to prevent those squares from hitting blue bars. The higher the score, the faster the bars move. We used an FPGA board with an IP core to read the ultrasonic sensor and control the VGA display.
detail.zh: 玩家通过改变手与传感器之间的距离，来控制屏幕上两个红色方块之间的间距，目标是避免方块撞到蓝色障碍物。分数越高，障碍移动越快。我们使用带有 IP Core 的 FPGA 开发板读取超声波传感器，并驱动 VGA 显示。

eyebrow.zh: 一起做点经得起时间考验的东西。

title.en: Thoughtful products, clean systems, and room to keep learning.
title.zh: 既做有完成度的产品，也做干净可靠的系统。

description.en: Open to thoughtful collaborations across engineering, research, and product work.
description.zh: 期待继续参与工程、研究与产品交叉点上的合作。

title.en: Two focused pages for the deeper material.
title.zh: 用两个更聚焦的页面承载更完整的内容。

description.en: Research papers come first, followed by a build archive for older student work and longer project notes.
description.zh: 先看研究论文，再看作品档案页，后者主要收纳学生时期的项目与更长的项目说明。

title.en: Publications across imaging, mobile agents, SLAM, and fabrication.
title.zh: 涵盖图像处理、移动智能体、SLAM 与制造方向的论文。

description.en: A focused page for publications across imaging, mobile agents, SLAM, and fabrication.
description.zh: 这个页面集中展示我在图像处理、移动智能体、SLAM 与制造方向的论文。

title.en: Older builds, student projects, and the fuller background context.
title.zh: 学生时期项目、早期作品，以及更完整的背景材料。

description.en: Older projects, longer write-ups, and the background that shaped how I build.
description.zh: 这里可以看到早期项目、更完整的项目说明，以及支撑这些经历的背景内容。

title.en: Older builds and student projects, kept as a clean archive.
title.zh: 以更整洁的方式保留学生时期项目与早期作品。

description.en: A place for earlier builds, detailed notes, and the broader context behind them.
